{{CargoRelic
|name=Secret Tea Recipe
|class_id=20499
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=No one knows exactly where the recipe came from. Thousands of tea brew masters have tried to find out its secret, but none were able to replicate the recipe.

One day, a frustrated dev monkey, who didn’t know what to design for the Relic to celebrate two million downloads, threw in a fit of rage every food found across the eight Realms into a blender…
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +10<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss2=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +20<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss3=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss4=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss7=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30<br>Types of Food Collected: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
